sophistication_level.description: Website sophistication level. basic/template = DIY or Wix/Squarespace. professional = clean agency site. custom = high-end custom build. stunning = best-in-class design.

team_size_estimate.description: Estimated team size. solo = 1 person. small = 2-5. medium = 6-15. large = 16+.

reasoning.description: Brief explanation of the assessment (1-2 sentences).
